name: RealtorTasksAI
tagline: 169 AI-powered tasks for real estate agents and brokers. Listings, offers, buyer emails, disclosures — done in minutes.
hero_description: Close more deals with less paperwork. RealtorTasksAI handles listing descriptions, buyer communications, transaction coordination, and compliance docs — all locally on your machine.
audience: Real estate agents, brokers, and transaction coordinators
sample_tasks: Draft a buyer representation agreement cover letter
Create an open house follow-up email
occupation: real estate agents, brokers, and realtors
hero_h1: Write the listing. Send the follow-up. Close the deal
hero_subhead: 169 ready-to-run tasks for every part of your deal — listing descriptions, offer letters, buyer emails, disclosure packets, CMA summaries, showing follow-ups, and more. Pick a task, answer a few questions, get professional output. No prompts to write. Works in Claude Desktop and OpenClaw.
hero_fine_print: 5 free credits on signup · Credits never expire · No subscription
features_intro: Built for agents who close deals, not write prompts
features_subtitle: Every task built for the exact work real estate agents do every day.
pricing_tagline: No subscriptions. Buy credits when you need them — one credit per task. Credits never expire, so you're never pressured to use them.

compliance.title: Zero document retention
compliance.description: RealtorTasksAI never receives your listings, client names, addresses, or transaction details. Our servers only count that a credit was used — nothing else.

compliance.title: Runs on your machine
compliance.description: Your documents go to your AI provider (Anthropic, OpenAI) under your account — or stay entirely local with OpenClaw + Ollama. Either way, we never see the content.

compliance.title: Works with any MCP client
compliance.description: Claude Desktop, OpenClaw, Cursor — if it supports MCP, RealtorTasksAI works in it. Switch AI providers anytime without losing your credits.

features.title: Listings That Get Showings
features.desc: Write compelling MLS descriptions, develop full marketing plans, schedule professional photography, optimize online listings, and manage syndication — in minutes, not hours.

features.title: Buyer & Seller Communications
features.desc: Draft offer letters, respond to inquiries, set expectations, handle objections, send personalized follow-ups, and keep clients informed at every stage without starting from scratch.

features.title: Transaction Coordination
features.desc: Manage checklists, coordinate inspections, appraisals, and title searches, track loan approval status, schedule the final walkthrough, and get to the closing table without anything falling through the cracks.

features.title: Disclosures & Compliance Docs
features.desc: Prepare seller disclosures, lead-based paint notices, agency disclosures, fair housing compliance, RESPA guidelines, and required transaction documents — correctly, every time.

features.title: Open House Management
features.desc: Promote open houses, manage sign-in sheets, schedule and confirm showings, handle no-shows, follow up on feedback, and convert open house leads into active buyers.

features.title: Client Relationships & Referrals
features.desc: Build referral pipelines, maintain your contact database, send personalized check-ins, run client appreciation programs, and collect testimonials that bring in the next deal.

name: TeacherTasksAI
tagline: 200+ AI-powered administrative tools for teachers and educators.
hero_description: More time teaching, less time on paperwork. TeacherTasksAI handles parent communications, IEP documentation, lesson plan templates, report card comments, and classroom administration.
audience: K-12 teachers, special education staff, and school counselors
occupation: teachers, educators, and instructional staff
hero_h1: Turn hours of paperwork into minutes of AI
hero_eyebrow: For K-12 teachers, SpEd staff & counselors
hero_subhead: TeacherTasksAI is a plugin for Claude Desktop with 200+ ready-to-run tasks — IEP summaries, report card comments, parent emails, behavior plans, and more. Pick a task, answer a few questions, done. No prompt writing. FERPA-aligned.
hero_fine_print: 5 free credits on signup · Credits never expire · No subscription
features_intro: Built for K-12 teachers, SpEd staff & counselors
features_subtitle: Every task built for what happens before, during, and after class.
pricing_tagline: No subscriptions. Individual teachers pay per credit pack; schools and districts get volume pricing. Credits never expire.
api_cost_disclaimer: TeacherTasksAI credits cover TeacherTasksAI tasks only. The AI itself runs through Claude Desktop or another MCP-compatible client, which may require its own API key or subscription (Anthropic, OpenAI, etc.). Plan for that separately.

compliance.title: FERPA-Aligned
compliance.description: Student data stays on your machine. Our servers only count credits used — we never see names, grades, IEP details, or any education record content.

compliance.title: COPPA-Conscious
compliance.description: No student accounts. No tracking of minors. Teachers use the tool on their own devices; students never interact with TeacherTasksAI.

compliance.title: SOPIPA-Compatible
compliance.description: Designed to comply with California SOPIPA and similar state-level student-data-privacy laws. Share our privacy page with your district IT team.
